description:
Native Windows dictation app with transcription, rewrite workflows, hotkeys, and paste automation.

BlitzText Windows is a native Windows desktop app for recording speech with hotkeys, transcribing it, optionally rewriting it through configured AI providers, and copying or pasting the result into the active app.
Updates publisher metadata to EinsVier, adds light/dark/system theme selection, improves help text and status visibility, marks the active rewrite provider, adds Ollama model selection from test results, introduces an editable spoken-text and final-text result workspace with workflow reprocessing and read-only prompt inspection, supports appending microphone recordings to the spoken text, links to Windows sound settings, protects custom prompts before presets or resets replace them, adds setup checks and friendlier provider error messages, preserves the previous clipboard contents after AutoPaste, improves paste behavior for editors such as Notepad++, adds custom install path support, refreshes the app icon, and exits cleanly from the tray menu.
